_comment: Dynamic tools configuration for Klawed Browser Controller.
_description: Copy or symlink this to .klawed/dynamic_tools.json, or set KLAWED_DYNAMIC_TOOLS env var.
_setup: Install the Chrome extension + Go host first: cd chrome_extension_native_messaging/host && make install EXTENSION_ID=<your-id>

function.name: BrowserControl
function.description:
Control a real Chrome/Chromium browser via the Klawed Browser Controller extension (must be connected - green dot in toolbar).

ALWAYS prefer structured commands over evaluate for reliability and security.

Navigation: navigate(url), goBack, goForward, reload, newTab(url), closeTab(tabId), switchTab(tabId)
Tab info:   listTabs, getActiveTab
Page text:  getReadableText(maxLength?), getText(selector?, maxLength?)
Page HTML:  getPageSource(maxLength?) — scripts/styles stripped; default 20k chars
DOM:        click(selector), type(selector,text,clearFirst?), getHtml(selector?), getAttribute(selector,attribute)
            findElements(selector,limit?=50), getLinks(limit?=50), getForms, fillForm(data), submitForm(selector?), pressKey(selector?,key)
Scroll:     scroll(x,y), scrollBy(dx,dy), scrollToElement(selector)
Wait:       waitForElement(selector,timeout?)
Capture:    screenshot
Debug:      ping, getInfo
Fallback:   evaluate(code) — use ONLY when structured commands are insufficient (e.g. shadow DOM, complex state)

Tip: prefer getText/getReadableText with a selector or small maxLength over getPageSource. Use click/type/pressKey instead of evaluate for interactions.
